description: Add killer micro-features to quantmax (short video + dating + random chat), quantai (AI assistant), and quantads (advertising). For quantmax: duet/stitch video service, sound library, trending hashtags, live gifting. For quantai: custom personas/GPTs, prompt library, conversation branching, code interpreter. For quantads: A/B testing engine, audience lookalikes, retargeting pixels, conversion tracking, ROI calculator.
steps: Create apps/quantmax/src/services/duet-stitch.service.ts - DuetStitchService with createDuet(originalVideoId, userVideoId, layout), createStitch(originalVideoId, userVideoId, stitchPoint), getLayouts(). Support side-by-side, top-bottom, green-screen layouts

Create apps/quantmax/src/services/sound-library.service.ts - SoundLibraryService with search(query), getTrending(), getByCategory(), addToFavorites(soundId), getUsageCount(soundId). Categories: music, effects, voiceovers

Create apps/quantmax/src/services/trending-hashtags.service.ts - TrendingHashtagsService with getTrending(limit), getHashtagStats(tag), suggestHashtags(content), getRelated(tag). Track velocity and volume

Create apps/quantmax/src/services/live-gifting.service.ts - LiveGiftingService with sendGift(streamId, giftId, quantity), getAvailableGifts(), getGiftHistory(streamId), calculateCreatorEarnings(). Virtual currency conversion

Create apps/quantai/src/services/personas.service.ts - PersonasService with create(name, systemPrompt, model, avatar), update(id, changes), delete(id), list(), activate(id). Custom GPT-like personas with specific instructions

Create apps/quantai/src/services/prompt-library.service.ts - PromptLibraryService with save(prompt, category, tags), search(query), getByCategory(), getFavorites(), getPopular(). Community and personal prompt storage

Create apps/quantai/src/services/conversation-branching.service.ts - ConversationBranchingService with branch(conversationId, fromMessageId), mergeBranch(branchId), getBranches(conversationId), switchBranch(branchId). Allow exploring alternative conversation paths

Create apps/quantai/src/services/code-interpreter.service.ts - CodeInterpreterService with execute(code, language), getSupportedLanguages(), getExecutionHistory(), sandboxCreate(), sandboxDestroy(). Simulate code execution with output capture

Create apps/quantads/src/services/ab-testing.service.ts - ABTestingService with createTest(name, variants, traffic), getResults(testId), declareWinner(testId, variantId), pauseTest(). Statistical significance calculation

Create apps/quantads/src/services/audience-lookalike.service.ts - AudienceLookalikeService with createLookalike(sourceAudienceId, expansionFactor), getMatchScore(), estimateReach(). Find similar users based on behavior patterns

Create apps/quantads/src/services/retargeting.service.ts - RetargetingService with createPixel(siteId), trackEvent(pixelId, event, userData), getAudience(pixelId), createRetargetingCampaign(audienceId). Cookie-less first-party tracking

Create apps/quantads/src/services/conversion-tracking.service.ts - ConversionTrackingService with defineConversion(name, value, window), trackConversion(userId, conversionId), getConversionRate(campaignId), getROI(campaignId)
Create vitest tests for all 12 new services
acceptance_criteria: 12 new service classes across 3 apps with full TypeScript types
All files pass strict TypeScript compilation
verification: NODE_OPTIONS='' npx vitest run apps/quantmax/src/__tests__/ apps/quantai/src/__tests__/ apps/quantads/src/__tests__/
Run tsc verification on new files
findings: All 12 services and 12 test files created. 172 tests pass. Service files compile cleanly with strict TS. Pre-existing errors in quantmax backend (missing react types, unbuilt server-core refs) are not related to this feature.
